mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, avatar, is_super_admin, sso_provider, sso_id, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_user where username = #{username} limit 1
select from t_r_user where email = #{email} limit 1

select from t_r_user
where (username like concat('%', #{searchVal}, '%') or email like concat('%', #{searchVal}, '%'))
order by id asc
select from t_r_user order by id asc
